accessibility.title: Accessibility
accessibility.desc: To detect your hotkey and paste into any app.

keyboardAccess.title: Keyboard access
keyboardAccess.descGranted: To detect your hotkey in any app.
keyboardAccess.descDenied: To detect your hotkey in any app, run sudo usermod -aG input $USER in a terminal, then log out and back in.
keyboardAccess.toggleNote: Until then, the hotkey only works in toggle mode.

pasteTool.title: Paste tool
pasteTool.desc: To paste into other apps, install {{tool}}: sudo apt install {{tool}}

modelSetup.title: Download your private voice model
modelSetup.idleDesc: {{name}} runs on {{phrase}} and needs a one-time download{{size}}.
modelSetup.downloadingDesc: This stays on {{phrase}} — nothing is sent to the cloud.
modelSetup.buildingEngineDesc: Building the local speech engine. This only happens once.
modelSetup.errorFallback: Something went wrong while downloading the model.
modelSetup.waitingToFinish: Download your voice model to continue

modelSelector.cloudNote: Cloud models need an API key — we'll ask once.
modelSelector.requiredFor: Required to use {{model}}. Stored in your system keychain — never logged, never sent to us.
modelSelector.getKey: Don't have one? Get a {{provider}} key ↗
modelSelector.keyPlaceholder: Paste your secret key — e.g. sk-…

interfaceLanguage.label: Interface language
interfaceLanguage.desc: Change the language of the app interface.

application.autoUpdateDesc: Download new versions in the background as soon as they ship.
application.launchAtStartupDesc: Automatically start Freestyle when you log in to your computer.
application.showOnLaunchDesc: Open the dashboard window when Freestyle starts.

recording.hotkeyDescHold: Hold the shortcut to record, release to transcribe.
recording.hotkeyDescToggle: Press the shortcut once to start, press again to stop.
recording.activationDescHold: Push-to-talk while the shortcut is held.
recording.activationDescToggle: Press the shortcut once to start, again to stop.
recording.outputModeDesc: Paste into the active app, or copy to clipboard.
recording.soundDesc: Soft chimes at the start and end of recording.
recording.needsModifier: Hotkeys need a modifier or side mouse button

display.themeDesc: Light, dark, or follow your system.
display.widgetPositionDesc: Where the floating pill appears on your screen.

permissions.microphoneDesc: Required to capture audio for transcription.
permissions.accessibilityDescMac: Required to detect the global hotkey and paste into other apps. Toggle Freestyle on under System Settings › Privacy & Security › Accessibility.
permissions.accessibilityDescOther: Required to detect the global hotkey and paste into other apps.

data.pauseHistoryDesc: Stop saving new transcription sessions to history until you turn this off.
data.historyDesc: Permanently delete every saved session — this can't be undone.
data.clearHistoryConfirm: Clear all transcription history? This permanently deletes every saved session.
data.logsDesc: App logs are saved to a file on your device. Open the folder to share them when reporting a problem.

network.intro: For managed or corporate networks. Route model downloads and cloud requests through a proxy, and trust a custom certificate authority. Leave blank to use your system defaults or standard proxy environment variables.
network.proxyDesc: Send downloads and API requests through this proxy (e.g. http://proxy.corp:8080). Overrides HTTP_PROXY / HTTPS_PROXY.
network.caCertDesc: Path to a PEM certificate bundle to trust for TLS, in addition to the system store. Overrides NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS.
network.invalidProxy: Enter a valid http://, https:// or socks:// URL, or leave it blank.
network.invalidCaCert: Enter a valid certificate file path, or leave it blank.
network.envNote: The app also honors HTTP_PROXY, HTTPS_PROXY, NO_PROXY, NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS and SSL_CERT_FILE from the environment.

today.noModelsYet: No models yet. Models will appear here as you dictate.
today.emptyTimeline: your day is unwritten — your first session will land here.

history.title: History
history.aiEditToggleDesc: Show cleaned text instead of the raw transcript
history.nerdToggleDesc: Show tokens, latency and words per minute
history.pausedDesc: New transcriptions are not being saved to history right now.
history.emptyDesc: Hold your hotkey anywhere on {{phrase}}, speak, release. Your first transcript will appear here.
history.noResultsDates: no transcripts found for this date range.
history.noResultsBoth: no transcripts match that search and date range.

dictionary.title: Dictionary
dictionary.subtitle: Shortcuts that expand as you speak. Say the key, get the value.
dictionary.emptyDesc: Add a phrase you say often, like <example>my address</example> — and Freestyle expands it inline.
dictionary.noEntries: no entries — add one to start.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.modelCompatNote: Multi-word phrases work on Nova 3, OpenAI, and Groq. Nova 2 boosts single words. Scribe v1 does not use vocabulary bias.
vocabulary.emptyDesc: Add names, brands, or phrases you say often, like <example1>Nguyen</example1> or <example2>account number</example2>.
vocabulary.noTerms: no terms — add one to start.
vocabulary.importFailed: Import failed — file must be valid JSON.

tone.title: Tone
tone.subtitle: How much Freestyle cleans up — and how it sounds in each app.

disabledBanner.title: Cleanup is off.
disabledBanner.desc: These strength and tone settings apply once you turn on AI cleanup in Models. Your choices are saved until then.

cleanup.title: Tidy up as I talk.
cleanup.desc: How much to fix before your words land.
cleanup.noModelDesc: Choose one in Models. These settings apply as soon as a model is configured.

preview.rawSample: hey uh can you send the latest version i think the footer link is still wrong

low.title: Low
low.sample: Hey, uh, can you send the latest version? I think the footer link is still wrong.

medium.title: Medium
medium.sample: Hey, can you send the latest version? I think the footer link is still wrong.

high.title: High
high.sample: Can you send the latest version? I think the footer link is still wrong.

custom.title: Custom
custom.sample: Your prompt decides how much to rewrite, tighten, or preserve.

apps.hint: Add any app or website that should use this tone.
apps.openAppsEmpty: No open apps found right now. Open the app you want, then refresh.

personal.title: Texting voice.
personal.desc: Used in Messages, WhatsApp, Telegram, and Discord.

preview.rawSample: hey um i'm running like 10 minutes late i'll be there soon

polished.title: Polished
polished.sample: Hey, I'm running about 10 minutes late. I'll be there soon.

casual.title: Casual
casual.sample: Hey I'm running about 10 min late, I'll be there soon

very_casual.title: Very casual
very_casual.sample: running like 10 min late be there soon

off.title: Off
off.sample: Hey, I'm running about 10 minutes late. I'll be there soon.

work.title: Work voice.
work.desc: Used in Slack, LinkedIn, and recognized work chat surfaces.

preview.rawSample: reviewed the doc um a couple changes are still needed uh tighten the intro and update the footer links

direct.title: Direct
direct.sample: Reviewed the doc. A couple changes are still needed: tighten the intro and update the footer links.

friendly.title: Enthusiastic
friendly.sample: I reviewed the doc and it's looking really close! A couple changes are still needed, mostly the intro and footer links.

formal.title: Formal
formal.sample: I reviewed the document. A few revisions are still required, particularly in the introduction and footer links.

off.title: Off
off.sample: I reviewed the doc. A couple changes are still needed: tighten the intro and update the footer links.

email.title: Email voice.
email.desc: Used in Gmail, Outlook, Apple Mail, and Proton.

preview.subject: Thursday meeting + next steps
preview.rawSample: hi sam um just confirming we're still on for thursday at 2 uh i'll send the revised plan tomorrow morning let me know if you want anything else added thanks

casual.title: Casual
casual.sample:
Hi Sam,

Just confirming we're still on for Thursday at 2. I'll send the revised plan tomorrow morning. Let me know if you want anything else added.

Thanks,

warm.title: Warm
warm.sample:
Hi Sam,

Just confirming that we're still set for Thursday at 2. I'll send over the revised plan tomorrow morning, and I'm happy to add anything else you'd like covered.

Thanks,

formal.title: Formal
formal.sample:
Hi Sam,

I'm writing to confirm our meeting on Thursday at 2:00 PM. I will send the revised plan tomorrow morning. Please let me know if there is anything else you would like included.

Thank you,

off.title: Off
off.desc: No email formatting — just clean text.
off.sample: Hi Sam, just confirming we're still on for Thursday at 2. I'll send the revised plan tomorrow morning. Let me know if you want anything else added. Thanks.

everythingElse.title: Everything else.
everythingElse.desc: Anywhere that isn't a chat or email.

preview.rawSample: just pushed the fix uh should be good to test now

casual.title: Casual
casual.sample: just pushed the fix, should be good to test now

neutral.title: Neutral
neutral.sample: Just pushed the fix. Should be good to test now.

professional.title: Professional
professional.sample: I've pushed the fix; it should be ready to test now.

off.title: Off
off.sample: Just pushed the fix. Should be good to test now.

models.title: Models
models.noApiKeys: No API keys yet — choose a cloud model above and you'll be prompted for a key.
models.deleteLocalMsg: Remove {{name}} from {{phrase}}. The weights are deleted from your local cache; you can download them again later.
models.deleteProviderMsgBase: Delete the {{provider}} API key? This also removes all configured models for this provider
models.deleteProviderCurrentSuffix: , including a model you're currently using

picker.managedSignIn: Managed cloud · sign in once, no API key
picker.freestyleBundleSignedIn: Managed cloud · transcription and AI cleanup included
picker.freestyleBundleSignIn: Managed cloud · sign in once · transcription and cleanup included
picker.browseByokVoice: Browse cloud transcription models with your API key
picker.browseByokCleanup: Browse cloud cleanup models with your API key

cleanup.title: Cleanup intensity

desc.low: Fix punctuation, capitalization, and obvious slips. Keep wording and order.
desc.medium: Also smooth grammar and awkward phrasing. Keep meaning and order.
desc.high: Can rewrite, reorder, and combine sentences for flow. Keep meaning and facts.

cleanup.presetHint: Editing this prompt switches to Custom so presets stay intact.
cleanup.customHint: Your custom instructions are used for cleanup.

plugins.subtitle: Install plugins to add features. Each runs in the dictation pipeline and can ship its own page.
plugins.empty: Install a plugin to add features. Browse the available ones or add your own.
plugins.missingHint: Listed but not installed on disk. Uninstall to remove it.

detail.title: Details
detail.notFound: This plugin is no longer installed.
detail.noReadme: This plugin doesn't include a README.

browse.error: Couldn't load the plugin catalog. Check your connection and try again.
